title: User Portfolio and Preferences Snapshot
outcome: Portfolio positions (tickers, allocations, supporting metrics, sectors, and rationale) and user preferences (age: 25, net worth: $5M, high risk tolerance, wants lower beta and pairwise correlation, higher risk-adjusted returns and alpha potential) logged for downstream portfolio optimization analysis.

title: Optimized Portfolio Definition
outcome: Portfolio allocations redefined: weakest REIT/utilities cluster (EQIX, IIPR, FR, STAG, TRNO, AEE) removed and replaced with lower-beta/low-correlation diversifiers JXI, VIXY, ABBV, HAE, and TMCI. Risky outliers (NRG, DGNX, CRDO, OKLO, MTSI) trimmed for proper offense/defense balance. Sectors/industries now include additional global and healthcare exposures to dampen correlation and raise Sharpe/Sortino. All changes kept in portfolio_dict format for downstream analytics.

title: Optimized Portfolio and Change Log
outcome: Optimized equity/ETF portfolio finalized. Six REIT/utilities names removed; allocations shifted to new defensive, low-beta, and quality healthcare/global/alternative exposures. NRG, DGNX, OKLO, CRDO, and MTSI trimmed for risk and clustering. Added JXI, VIXY, ABBV, HAE, and TMCI for sector and correlation diversification. All adjustments tracked; structure now ready for risk/return analytics loop.
